name: Cookie run kingdom pick me problems (1)
description:
It was yet another meeting between all the representatives, sometime after the so-called Cookie Odyssey. The Council of Heroes was underway- the ancients on one side, and various representatives on the other.

Pure Vanilla sat alongside Amaranth Cookie and Dark Cacao Cookie, who himself was next to Hollyberry Cookie, and next to Hollyberry Cookie was Golden Cheese Cookie. There was a single empty seat- one held for the dearly missed White Lily Cookie. Though everyone knew now the truth of Dark Enchantress and White Lily, White Lily had been a hero all the same and a dear friend.

Clotted Creme sat across from the heroes, Financier Cookie at his side. And there were a handful of other cookies as well, some from the academy, some from the raisin village, and...notably, a few representatives from a relatively new kingdom. Not the Cookie Kingdom, but instead the Florian Kingdom.

The Florian Kingdom came to power around the time The Cookie Kingdom did, in fact. Though the two are entirely unrelated- as instead the Florian Kingdom is ruled by the most recent ancient cookie, Rhododendron Cookie. Bearing the Soul Jam of Beauty, Rhododendron is rumored to be an...acquired taste. And today was the day Rhododendron Cookie would be joining the meetings for the very first time, and meet the rest of The Council of Heroes.

And before long...the doors to the council room opened. Clotted Cream and Financier quit whispering to each other, Golden Cheese and Hollyberry paused in their jovial conversation, and Dark Cacao Cookie merely raised a brow. Pure Vanilla, with his Orchid Staff by his side, turned his gaze towards the door- preparing to welcome the new cookie with a warm smile.

The sound of horns announced Rhododendron’s arrival- a blur of pink and red as she entered the meeting room with a bright (if condescending) smile. “At last, I have arrived! I’m sure you all were just waiting to meet me.” Rhododendron said, a haughty expression on her face as she rested her hand on her hips. Her pink hair was tied up into two pigtails, a bundle of flowers crowning her head. Her outfit was also pink- though it had a black base to break things up slightly. Her skirt was layered, almost in the style of a wrap skirt. One side black with pink flowers, the other side all pink. And even more flowers were around her waist.

Rhododendron scanned the room, wrinkling her nose slightly as her gaze landed on Financier, Hollyberry, and Golden Cheese. Though her expression softened into something saccharine as she saw Clotted Cream, Dark Cacao, and Pure Vanilla Cookie.

“I’m Rhododendron Cookie- Queen of the Florian Kingdom, and I’m so excited to meet all you! I’ve heard soo much about all of you- especially you three.” She giggled, batting her eyes at Dark Cacao, Pure Vanilla, and Clotted Cream.

...Acquired taste indeed.
creator: Angele_Nightstar
